headline: HC Wainwright & Co. Reiterates Buy on Incyte, Maintains $135 Price Target
summary: HC Wainwright & Co.  analyst Mitchell S. Kapoor   reiterates Incyte (NASDAQ:INCY) with a Buy and maintains $135 price target.
